criteria.label: Ownership & maintenance
criteria.description: You own or actively maintain the repo; not a passive fork.

criteria.label: Impact & visibility
criteria.description: Stars, published packages, docs, or blog coverage.

criteria.label: Career relevance
criteria.description: Aligns with SWE, OSS, DevSecOps, or framework work you want to be known for.

criteria.label: Recency
criteria.description: Pushed within the last 90 days scores highest.

criteria.label: Narrative clarity
criteria.description: Can be explained in one line on a resume or interview.

pinned.highlight: Maintained OSS — DevSecOps for AI coding agents (npm published)

available_manual_boosts._note: Reference only — not applied while manual_boosts is empty. Copy a key into manual_boosts to enable.
